workshopTypes.name: Scaling Up with AI Virtual Workshop
workshopTypes.description: A Virtual Workshop for Business Owners and Leadership Teams. Learn to use AI as a true thought partner that challenges assumptions, clarifies ideas, and strengthens decisions.
features: Apply the CHIT framework so every leadership conversation becomes a structured thinking session
Pressure test your strategy in real time and identify blind spots
Turn AI into a weekly practice so you protect thinking time
Find at least five hours per week you can redeploy toward work that drives enterprise value
Build a culture where every team member can think at a higher level

workshopTypes.name: Scaling Up to Finish Strong Workshop
workshopTypes.description: Full-day intensive workshop on the 4 Decisions framework. Exit planning and scaling strategies for business owners.

workshopTypes.name: Scaling Up to Finish Strong Virtual Workshop
workshopTypes.description: Virtual version of the Finish Strong workshop. Half-day strategic planning session.
